title: arenaria querioides subsp. fontiqueri
intro: Arenaria querioides subsp. fontiqueri is a plant species of the carnation family, commonly known for its medicinal properties. This plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems, due to its anthraquinone and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Arenaria querioides subsp. fontiqueri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal uses.
